events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist, songwriter, and astrophysicist Sir Brian May was born on July 19, 1947.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the iconic Brian May! The man behind Queen's unforgettable riffs and solos, still rocking stages and inspiring generations.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' charismatic frontman, Sir Mick Jagger, was born on July 26, 1943, in Dartford, Kent.

angles.name: Still Got The Moves
angles.copy: 83 years young and still moving like Jagger! Wishing a very happy birthday to the one and only Sir Mick Jagger. What's your favourite Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) officially launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' being the very first music video aired.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV burst onto our screens, forever changing music and television. Remember the first video ever played? It was The Buggles with 'Video Killed The Radio Star' – how ironic!

events.title: Anniversary of Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe'
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, marking a pivotal moment in Britpop history.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: Roll with it! Today we're celebrating the anniversary of Oasis's game-changing debut album, 'Definitely Maybe'. Still sounds as fresh and vital as it did in '94. What's your top track?

events.title: Woodstock Festival anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a defining moment of the 1960s counterculture, took place from August 15-18, 1969.

angles.name: Peace, Love, Music
angles.copy: 57 years since half a million people descended on a dairy farm for three days of peace, love, and music. The spirit of Woodstock '69 lives on!

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: August 16, 2026, marks 49 years since the death of the King of Rock 'n' Roll, Elvis Presley, who would have been 91 this year.

angles.name: Long Live The King
angles.copy: Remembering the King today, 49 years on. Elvis Presley's music and legacy continue to captivate, proving he's still very much in the building.

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur being shot
events.blurb: On September 7, 1996, iconic rapper Tupac Shakur was shot in a drive-by incident in Las Vegas; he later died on September 13, 1996, and would have been 55 this year.

angles.name: Remembering Tupac
angles.copy: Remembering the profound impact of Tupac Shakur today. His voice, lyrics, and legacy continue to resonate, 30 years after the tragic shooting incident in Las Vegas.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: September 18, 2026, marks 56 years since the death of guitar legend Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84 this year.

angles.name: Electric Genius
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled genius of Jimi Hendrix today. His revolutionary guitar work changed music forever, and his influence is still felt in every riff.

events.title: Anniversary of The Beatles' 'Abbey Road'
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic 'Abbey Road' album was released in the UK on September 26, 1969.

angles.name: Iconic Crossing
angles.copy: Still crossing that road 57 years later! Celebrating The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' album today – a true masterpiece from start to finish.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' formidable frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, was born on September 7, 1951, in Akron, Ohio.

angles.name: Pretenders Power
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon, still delivering that signature Pretenders attitude and sound.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye's distinctive vocalist, Liam Gallagher, was born on September 21, 1972, in Manchester.

angles.name: Mad For It
angles.copy: Another year older, still as rock 'n' roll as ever! Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher. What's your favourite Liam moment?

events.title: Anniversary of John Lennon's 'Imagine' single
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic single 'Imagine' was first released in the US on October 11, 1971, and in the UK in 1975 to promote the 'Shaved Fish' compilation.

angles.name: A Timeless Vision
angles.copy: Imagine all the people... living life in peace. Celebrating the enduring power of John Lennon's 'Imagine' today, a song that still resonates globally.

events.title: Anniversary of the first iPod
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first-generation iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising how we listen to music.

angles.name: Pocket Full of Music
angles.copy: Remember when your entire music collection could fit in your pocket? Today marks the anniversary of Apple introducing the original iPod – a game-changer for music lovers everywhere.

events.title: Happy James Bond Day!
events.blurb: October 5th marks James Bond Day, celebrating the premiere of the very first Bond film, 'Dr. No', on this date in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Licence to thrill! Happy James Bond Day to all 007 fans. What's your favourite Bond film, song, or gadget?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Legendary Beatles co-founder and peace activist John Lennon was born on October 9, 1940, and tragically passed away on December 8, 1980.

angles.name: Remembering John
angles.copy: Remembering the visionary John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His music and message of peace continue to inspire.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The iconic British comedian, actor, and writer John Cleese, best known for Monty Python and Fawlty Towers, was born on October 27, 1939.

angles.name: Comedy Legend
angles.copy: And now for something completely different... Happy 87th birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! A true titan of British comedy.

events.title: Anniversary of The Beatles' 'White Album'
events.blurb: The Beatles' self-titled double album, commonly known as 'The White Album', was released in the UK on November 22, 1968.

angles.name: White Album Wonder
angles.copy: 58 years since The Beatles delivered their sprawling, eclectic 'White Album'. A double LP packed with diverse sounds that still sparks debate and delight.
